## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.runtimeConfections property

Gets all runtime confections as an iterable map. Confections are resolved lazily and cached on first access.

**Signature:**

```typescript
get runtimeConfections(): ReadonlyMap<ConfectionId, AnyConfection>;
```
